text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text: Mhm, thanks, 姐姐. Yep, I'll call again later.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Was that a birthday call from 
your big sister in Hong Kong?

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
Yes, my sisters and parents have been 
bombarding me with calls and texts ever 
since the date changed… Heh, it's hectic, 
but I wouldn't have it any other way!

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I mean that's true… but I also think 
they're a little worried about me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
They think I must be so lonely being all alone 
in Japan on my birthday… Ahaha, I have to 
tell them I'm not a kid anymore.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
…In that case, we'll throw you a birthday 
party, Crown! A big one, with everyone!! 
Right, Cheval?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You can think of me and Cheval 
just like family!! Right, Cheval?

text_block_list.name: Cheval Grand
text_block_list.text:
F-Family?! Me…?! I-I don't know… 
Would you even want that…?

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, of course! I'd love that!!

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now that I have family in Japan 
to celebrate with, I'll have to tell 姐姐 
and the others that they have nothing 
to worry about♪
